original_abstract: This study evaluates the implementation of the textbook *Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah* at Ar Riyadh Islamic Boarding School, prompted by the observation that existing curricula relied on archaic vocabulary poorly suited to the students' diverse backgrounds and daily conversational needs. The research aims to explore the practical application of this textbook and assess its effectiveness in enhancing students' Arabic speaking skills. Utilizing a quantitative experimental approach to provide a rigorous numerical analysis of the phenomenon, the study drew data from teachers and students through observations, interviews, documentation, and questionnaires. The findings indicate that the book is highly well-received, with 86% of students favoring its use. Furthermore, statistical analysis demonstrates that the textbook significantly improves speaking proficiency; a comparison of pre- and post-test results for the experimental group revealed a substantial T-value of 5.38, confirming that *Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah* is an effective pedagogical tool for developing functional linguistic competence in a boarding school setting.
humanized_abstract: Ar Riyadh Islamic Boarding School implemented the new Arabic language textbook entitled Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah due to the old curriculum using outdated vocabulary, which the students could barely relate to the reality of the society they live in and could not match their everyday conversations. Thus, this study investigated the implementation of Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah as the new textbook in the Arabic language department of Ar Riyadh Islamic Boarding School. Using quantitative experimental approach in order to offer an in-depth numerical investigation of the phenomenon under study, the data for this study was collected from teachers and students through observing their performances, interviewing them, collecting documents and administering the questionnaire. The results of this study showed that the students were satisfied to learn Arabic language using Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah because 86% of them expressed satisfaction on using the textbook in the class. The analysis of variance indicated that there was a highly significant difference in the students' performance in speaking Arabic language before and after implementing the new textbook, and this indicated a T-value of 5.38, which proved that the new textbook Hilal Fii Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah helped in developing the students' functional language skill.
